ques: Find EV charging supported parking closest to Smithsonian museum.
answer: The closest EV-charging-supported parking to the Smithsonian is the L'Enfant Plaza parking garage (Blink Charging Station, 500 L'Enfant Plaza SW, Washington, DC 20024) — open 24h, ~0.4 mi / 10-min walk (2-min drive) from the Smithsonian Institution Building.
